Title: Relates to requiring the availability of no-fee basic banking accounts for consumers
Summary: Provides that every banking institution operating in the state of New York shall offer at least one no-fee basic banking account that charges no monthly maintenance or service fees, requires no minimum balance, charges no fees based on account inactivity, and provides certain essential services including deposits and withdrawals, debit card access, and electronic payments and transfers.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the banking law, in relation to requiring the availability of no-fee basic banking accounts for consumers
